list.name: Changes
list.comment: ReverseEachWord problem using no inbuilt methods

task.summary: reverse the both part of the linked list
RemoveAllDuplicates element from the unsorted order array
IsPalindrome this is the first approach
IsPalindrome this is the 2nd approach divided into two part from middle
IsPalindrome this is the 2nd approach divided into two part from middle
IsPalindromeWithValidSpecialcharacter this is the 2nd approach divided into two part from middle
ReverseEachWord problem using no inbuilt methods
